title: Agent
description: An installed agent, recorded in track.yaml.

creationTimestamp.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp stamped by sauron when the document was created; never hand-edited.

lastUpdatedTimestamp.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp stamped by sauron on the document's most recent write; never hand-edited.

registry.description: Name of the source registry; with kind and name, the unique key.

version.description: Optional human-meaningful version; derivable for git, declared-only otherwise.

digest.description: Content identity used to detect change and local drift; always present.

path.description: Exact installed location relative to the provider root (sauron-<registry>-<name>).

direct.description: True when the user installed this artifact explicitly.

personas.description: Personas that also bring this artifact in.
